# Core References

These reference files support the core policy without bloating the always-on instruction layer.

- `codex-adaptation.md`: how Claude-derived materials and subagents should be transformed for Codex.
- `safe-integrations.md`: rules for optional, host-specific, or unsafe integrations.
- `agent-design.md`: target shape for the Codex-native agent layer.
- `source-policy-map.md`: which source families feed core, references, skills, and agents.
- `communication-style.md`: concise user-facing communication behavior adapted from Claude-derived material.
- `editing-discipline.md`: read-before-edit and minimal-diff discipline.
- `tool-selection.md`: when to prefer dedicated tools over generic shell usage.
- `careful-execution.md`: practical safety rules for risky or hard-to-reverse actions.

Read these only when the current task needs deeper policy, migration context, or packaging decisions.
